name: Block-to-Damage Engine
summary: Build Block/Guarded, then turn prevention into Counter damage or bash payoffs.
payoffPattern: Counter cards, shield-wall cards and guard-to-damage attacks.
deckAdvice: Pair with Blue affinity and armour that starts combat with Block.

name: Panic Furnace
summary: Accept or generate Panic, then turn instability into bigger attacks.
payoffPattern: Strange attacks, scythes and cards that gain power from Panic or clearing Panic.
deckAdvice: Pair with controlled Panic clearing so the deck does not collapse before the payoff.

name: Status Stack
summary: Stack Bleed, Poison, Burn, Shock or Snared until the quarry buckles under pressure.
payoffPattern: Repeat hits, low-cost attacks and status riders.
deckAdvice: Pair with Red affinity and draw/filtering to keep pressure constant.

name: Weak-Point Breaker
summary: Open, mark and break weak points for burst damage and reward/control triggers.
payoffPattern: Break-damage attacks and weak-point payoff cards.
deckAdvice: Pair with Purple reward pieces or ranged setup cards.

name: Combo Tempo
summary: Chain low-cost attacks, follow-ups and first-card bonuses into smooth damage turns.
rampResource: Cards played this turn / cheap attacks
payoffPattern: Follow-up riders, extra draw, cost reduction and repeated attack bonuses.
deckAdvice: Pair with draw/filtering so chain pieces appear together.

name: Heavy Breaker
summary: Build slowly into huge single hits, guard breaks and expensive attacks.
payoffPattern: High base damage, break damage and guard stripping.
deckAdvice: Pair with Green or Blue support to survive the setup turn.

name: Ranged Control
summary: Mark, pin or soften the quarry from a distance before committing.
payoffPattern: Ranged attacks that ignore guard, break weak points or improve follow-up hits.
deckAdvice: Pair with mobility and weak-point reward gear.

name: Resource Hunter
summary: Turn tests, broken weak points and retreats into more resources.
payoffPattern: Extra resources, preserved resources, salvage and improved hunt rewards.
deckAdvice: Pair with Purple affinity for reward spikes after a successful hunt.

name: Party Support Weapon
summary: Use weapon actions to protect or set up allies rather than only dealing damage.
payoffPattern: Ally buffs, block grants, panic clear and shared payoffs.
deckAdvice: Pair with Green affinity and other support gear.

name: Wound-Risk Berserker
summary: Grow damage from wounds, low safety or self-inflicted risk.
payoffPattern: Bonus damage when wounded, exposed or after paying risky costs.
deckAdvice: Pair with healing or death prevention so ramp does not kill the survivor.
